metadata.claim_boundary: Internal multi-lens quality-control review only; not independent external validation, not reviewer approval, and not a basis for circuit-closure or hardware-energy claims.

required_questions.Q1: Is novelty clear after acknowledging HyAtten, ENLighten, Lightening-Transformer, ASTRA, SCATTER, serving schedulers, and approximate computing?
required_questions.Q2: Does the paper ever imply slack is semantic importance?
required_questions.Q3: Does SPICE evidence reduce concern, or invite circuit-reviewer rejection by overclaiming?
required_questions.Q4: Is E6 beating E7 handled as a strength of the composition story?
required_questions.Q5: Are measured accuracy and modeled energy clearly separated?
required_questions.Q6: Is the paper too long or too appendix-heavy for JETC?
required_questions.Q7: Would the paper survive if C1 were downgraded from novelty proof to scoped motivation?
required_questions.Q8: Does the ADC-Tier Calibration anchor make SPICE visible enough without inviting circuit-closure review?

rows.finding: Novelty is strongest when stated as a scheduler-to-accelerator budget interface, not as priority over slack/deadline scheduling, approximate computing, or photonic pruning.
rows.evidence_checked: adjacent-work table; C1 scoped survey text; E6/E7 ablation text; conclusion boundary
rows.required_action: Keep adjacent-work boundary table and composition wording; do not say slack is semantic importance or slack-only superiority.
rows.promotion_effect: main_text wording is eligible; no broader novelty claim promoted

rows.finding: E6 L1-signal beating E7 could look like a failed SUDS result unless framed as evidence for composition with local selectors.
rows.evidence_checked: abstract; C5 contribution; full MPS ablation figure caption; validation-scope limitation
rows.required_action: Leave E6 stronger than E7 in the abstract and limitations; present the measured claim as composition, not slack-only superiority.

rows.finding: The ngspice ADC macro evidence reduces ADC-energy-model skepticism only if it remains macro calibration, not silicon, PDK, extracted-layout, measured hardware-energy, or SPICE closure evidence.
rows.evidence_checked: J1 CSV/JSON/report; ADC-Tier Calibration anchor; P3 boundary table; limitations
rows.required_action: Keep one compact ADC-Tier Calibration anchor in main text; keep decks, stress rows, traces, and regeneration command in appendix/report artifacts.
rows.promotion_effect: appendix support only; no circuit-closure promotion

rows.finding: Yosys synthesis materially improves RTL existence evidence, but timing, gate-equivalent area, and power are still proxy because there is no liberty/OpenROAD/place-and-route lane.
rows.evidence_checked: J2 RTL synthesis JSON/report; P3 boundary table; limitations
rows.required_action: Use rtl_synthesis for the block existence check and keep timing/GE/power wording as proxy overhead accounting.
rows.promotion_effect: appendix overhead evidence; not implementation closure

rows.finding: Serving-scheduler reviewers may read SUDS as a scheduling algorithm unless the interface boundary remains explicit.
rows.evidence_checked: adjacent-work table; related-work boundary audit; generalisation procedure
rows.required_action: Maintain wording that serving schedulers manage requests/batches while SUDS exposes an accelerator-internal control surface they could call.
rows.promotion_effect: non-blocking risk; paper remains methodology contribution

rows.finding: The appendix is dense, but moving full SPICE decks or stress matrices into the main body would hurt JETC fit.
rows.evidence_checked: results section; appendix P2/P3 tables; J1 report
rows.required_action: Keep only compact ADC-tier anchor in the main text and leave full deck/stress/regeneration details in report/supplement.

rows.finding: Public reproduction must regenerate the ADC macro suite without private paths, private data, weights, commercial EDA, or PDK dependencies.
rows.evidence_checked: public repro manifest; J1 deck paths; public-repro-check result
rows.required_action: Keep deck trace paths repo-relative; expose ngspice as an optional open-source dependency; record Xyce absence as a tool blocker rather than silent fallback.

rows.finding: C1 remains useful if downgraded from novelty proof to scoped motivation because the paper already argues an interface gap within a frozen technical subset.
rows.evidence_checked: C1 survey manifest; systematic literature evidence text; adjacent-work boundary
rows.required_action: Do not strengthen C1 beyond the frozen 167-item SUDS technical subset; keep venue/routing cards out of C1 evidence.
